title: Beyond the End
description: The true final dimension that lies beyond the End, with new mobs, structures and weapons!
body:
![d](https://i.imgur.com/1VxbcSD.png)
### The Beyond is Minecraft’s true final chapter, a hidden dimension that opens only after you defeat the Ender Dragon. If you’ve completed the End so many times that it’s starting to feel routine, The Beyond is your new challenge. Step into this hidden dimension to face new mobs, discover new weapons, and experience the true end of the Minecraft universe.

# How to enter The Beyond:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Take down the Ender Dragon in the End. After the battle, the dragon will drop Bottles of Blood. Make sure to collect these bottles. 
2. Collect some End Stone from the End dimension.
3. Smelt the End Stone in a furnace or blast furnace to transform it into Void Stone. 
4. Construct a portal frame using the Void Stone, similar to a Nether portal frame, but with Void Stone blocks.
5. Place a Bottle of Blood into the portal. This will activate the portal. 

</details>


![d](https://i.imgur.com/D2pRyRG.png)
![d](https://i.imgur.com/hTtTNph.png)
- Eclipsar, the powerful endboss of The Beyond. Shrouded in dark energy, he can summon fierce lightning and launch explosive attacks. Eclipsar stands as the ultimate challenge in this forgotten dimension. Defeating him is the true test of your skills and marks the real end of your Minecraft journey.

![d](https://i.imgur.com/cwHMU6A.png)
- The Vermilith Staff and Astralith Staff are powerful new weapons, crafted from the unique ores Vermilith and Astralith found in The Beyond. The Vermilith Staff channels intense fire explosions, while the Astralith Staff harnesses lightning to strike down enemies. 

### 📜 The Beyond Minecraft Lore

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The Beyond is a dimension born from the echoes of an ancient and forgotten era. After the fall of the ancient Builders and the subsequent rise of the Ender Dragon, the true nature of existence became shrouded in mystery. The Beyond is said to be the final resting place of the Builders' most profound secrets, a realm that exists beyond the known dimensions, where the boundaries between reality and the void blur.

Long ago, the Builders sought to harness the raw power of the cosmos, trying to create a dimension that would hold the ultimate truth of their existence. They used powerful artifacts and ancient magics to forge The Beyond, intending it to be a sanctuary of knowledge and a final test for those who would seek the ultimate truth. But something went wrong. The dimension became a place of paradoxes, an endless void illuminated by a celestial light, where the remnants of the Builders' failed experiments still linger.The Beyond was sealed away by the Builders as a final measure to prevent its power from falling into the wrong hands. The Ender Dragon's defeat is the key to unlocking this hidden realm, as it disrupts the ancient seal and reveals the portal to The Beyond. Only those who have triumphed over the Ender Dragon can access this dimension, proving their worth and readiness for the ultimate challenge.

In The Beyond, the landscape is filled with ethereal structures and ancient ruins, remnants of the Builders' grand designs. The dimension is a place of both wonder and peril, where the cosmic energies that the Builders once harnessed have transformed into formidable threats. The ultimate challenge here is to face the Eclipsar, a powerful entity born from the raw energies of the dimension itself, a guardian of the final secrets and the ultimate test of one's strength and resolve.

By venturing into The Beyond, players are not only uncovering the true endgame of Minecraft but also delving into the final chapter of the ancient Builders’ story, completing their journey through the mysteries of the universe and the echoes of a forgotten past....

</details>
